name: design-system-demo
postCreateCommand:
npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code && grep -qF 'design-system-demo: auto-load project .env' ~/.bashrc || printf '
# design-system-demo: auto-load project .env (e.g. FIGMA_ACCESS_TOKEN) so it is
# available for .mcp.json variable expansion when the claude CLI launches.
if [ -f "${containerWorkspaceFolder}/.env" ]; then
    set -a
    . "${containerWorkspaceFolder}/.env"
    set +a
fi
' >> ~/.bashrc
